definition.name: def-spectral-idempotent
definition.definition: Let Phi: B(H)_sa->B(H)_sa be unital positive and almost idempotent. Set S=2Phi-1 in End(B(H)_sa), define R=(S^2)^{-1/2} by the binomial series for (1-(1-S^2))^{-1/2} (convergent since ||S^2-1||=4||Phi^2-Phi||<=4eta<1 for eta<1/4), set sgn(S)=SR, and put P=theta(2Phi-1)=(1/2)(1+sgn(S))=(1/2)(1+(2Phi-1)(1-4(Phi-Phi^2))^{-1/2}). This is the spectral idempotent of Phi for the spectral cluster near 1.
